summary: Backend testing completed for P0 Bug Fixes and PHASE 5.3 Order Routing Engine. All 19 API tests passed (100%). Both bug fixes verified working: 1) MarketDataNormalizer handles invalid bids/asks (0, None, etc) without TypeError, 2) FailoverEngine.get_system_status() method works correctly for routing integration.
passed_tests: P0 Bug Fix #1: MarketDataNormalizer orderbook handles invalid bids/asks (0, None, '', {}) - returns empty lists instead of TypeError
P0 Bug Fix #2: FailoverEngine.get_system_status() method exists and returns correct status dict
GET /api/market-data/orderbook/BTCUSDT - returns orderbook with proper list types
POST /api/routing/evaluate - evaluates routing and returns decision
POST /api/routing/plan - creates execution plan with legs
GET /api/routing/venues/BTCUSDT - returns venue analysis for all exchanges
GET /api/routing/slippage/BTCUSDT - returns slippage analysis (MOCKED via slippage_adapter.py)
Integration: Routing engine uses failover engine correctly without AttributeError
Routing with all policies (BEST_PRICE, BEST_EXECUTION, SAFEST_VENUE, LOW_SLIPPAGE, LOWEST_FEE)
Routing with all urgencies (LOW, NORMAL, HIGH, IMMEDIATE)
seed_data_creation: None required - market data simulated internally
context_for_next_testing_agent: PHASE 5.2 Market Data Engine and PHASE 5.3 Order Routing Engine both fully functional. Two P0 bugs were fixed: 1) MarketDataNormalizer now validates bids/asks are lists (lines 151-172), 2) FailoverEngine now has get_system_status() method (line 171). SlippageEngine is MOCKED via slippage_adapter.py. Test file test_phase53_routing_market_data.py covers all endpoints.

P0_bug_1.description: TypeError in OrderbookStreamProcessor when bids/asks were 0 instead of empty list
P0_bug_1.fix_description: Added isinstance() check to ensure bids/asks are lists before iteration

P0_bug_2.fix_description: Added get_system_status() method that returns system status dict for routing engine

mocked_apis.SlippageEngine: MOCKED via slippage_adapter.py - simplified slippage predictions
